description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly matte black exterior and sharp, geometric lines. The front section is pointed and tapers outward into wide, wing-like side panels, giving it an aggressive, futuristic appearance. Two large, cylindrical engine housings with orange-yellow intakes and metallic gold exhaust cones dominate the rear, suggesting powerful propulsion. The surface is textured with a grid-like pattern, enhancing grip and visual interest. Subtle maroon accents run along the top and sides, adding contrast to the otherwise dark color scheme. The cockpit area is compact, with no visible seat or handlebar details from these views.
description: A matte black, angular jet ski with wide, wing-like sides and prominent dual rear engines featuring orange and gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide angular wings, and the dual orange engine intakes.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlights the gold engine exhausts and the textured, grid-patterned surface.
description_view_2: Rear view focuses on the two large, gold-tipped engine exhausts and the broad, flat rear profile.
description_view_3: Right rear angle displays the maroon accents along the top and the pronounced engine housings.
attribute_handlebar_design: No visible handlebar is present in the provided views.
attribute_seat_configuration: No visible seat or seating configuration is discernible from the provided images.
